BeneficiaryParty.Name: Innovative AIX
BeneficiaryParty.Address: Suite 180, 1st Floor, Nemea Building, 6 Isocrates Street, 2360 Strovolos, Cyprus

Transaction.SuspiciousActivity: Large wire transfer to an offshore entity with limited public information.
Transaction.Notes: Further investigation recommended. Beneficiary’s website lacks detailed information. Contact details seem generic.
